clauses.text: FastFreight shall deliver all shipments within 48 hours of pickup. Failure to deliver on time incurs a penalty of $2,000 per shipment per day of delay.
Meridian must issue written notice of breach within 72 hours of discovering the breach to preserve penalty rights.
Meridian guarantees 99% on-time delivery. Failure triggers a client credit of $10,000 per percentage point below threshold.
Meridian must proactively notify RetailCo of delivery delays within 24 hours of learning of the delay.

dependency_edges.description: FastFreight delivery failures directly cause Meridian SLA breaches with RetailCo. The vendor penalty ($50K) and client penalty ($80K) can stack if both notice windows are missed.

deadlines.description: Send proactive delay notice to RetailCo Inc. (24-hour window)
deadlines.consequence_description: Failure to notify RetailCo adds $20K penalty on top of SLA credits.

deadlines.description: Issue formal breach notice to FastFreight Ltd. (72-hour window)
deadlines.consequence_description: Without timely notice, Meridian loses right to claim $50K vendor penalty.

shock_events.title: FastFreight Driver Strike — Delivery Halt
shock_events.description: FastFreight Ltd. drivers have walked off the job in an unannounced wildcat strike. All 25 pending Meridian shipments for RetailCo Inc. are delayed indefinitely. Vendor penalty rights must be preserved with timely written notice. RetailCo SLA credits are accruing. Cross-reference your vendor and client contracts — the penalties may cascade.

initial_inbox.subject: Service Disruption Notice
initial_inbox.body: We regret to inform you that an unexpected labor action has halted our delivery operations. We estimate service restoration within 5-7 business days. We will provide further updates as available.

initial_inbox.subject: Missing Shipments — Status Request
initial_inbox.body: We are awaiting 25 shipments that were due today. Our distribution centers are running below capacity. Please provide an immediate status update. Our SLA monitoring team has been notified.
